response: CS Lead James shared an urgent customer escalation update regarding Acme Corp, a $450K annual recurring revenue client that is threatening to churn after experiencing three weeks of API latency spikes and five days without a response from their support team, leading Acme’s CTO to reach out directly to raise their critical concerns. James has already assigned a dedicated engineer to address Acme Corp’s outstanding issues, and he is requesting an executive sponsor to join a call with the client this week to de-escalate tensions and prevent the high-value client from leaving.
